title: Ahoy Pirate Luncheon Napkins (16cm) - Vibrant Colorful Party Napkins - Perfect for Swashbuckling Celebrations - 16ct
features: VIBRANT & COLORFUL DESIGN: Ahoy pirate luncheon napkins feature a captivating pirate-themed design that will add a splash of color and excitement to your swashbuckling celebration. Perfect for kids and adults alike.

STURDY & DURABLE MATERIAL: Made from premium quality material, our 16cm party napkins are built to withstand even the messiest of feasts, ensuring that your tabletops stay clean and your guests stay happy.

PERFECT FOR CELEBRATIONS: Ahoy pirate napkins are designed to fit seamlessly into any pirate-themed event, be it a birthday party, treasure hunt, or a friendly gathering for those who love the high seas and adventure.

EASY TO USE: Our pirate napkins are pre-folded and ready for action! Unfold and place at your themed party table, or keep them handy by the buffet for a quick clean-up. Either way, your swashbuckling adventurers will appreciate the ease and convenience.

VALUE PACK OF 16CT: Each pack includes 16 ahoy pirate luncheon napkins, ensuring you have enough for your entire crew. Stock up now and make your pirate party the talk of the town with these must-have, versatile and eye-catching napkins.
